title: Field Support Executive (Franchise, Operation & Business Development for Tuition Centre)  - YZ11
description:
Position title : Field Support Executive (Operation & Business Development for Tuition Centre)

Location: Somerset
Working Days:  5-day (including Sat & Sun)
Working Timing: Start work at 10AM ; Weekday end at 6PM/630PM/7PM ; Saturday end at 5PM & Sun End at 430PM
Salary : $3500 - $4300 

Job Description

  • Lead the setting up of new centres, overseeing all aspects of operational planning, logistics, and staffing to ensure a smooth and successful launch.
  • Reaching out / Business develop to potential franchisee. 
  • To support develop SOP for setting up new centre with the goal of using these guidelines for future franchise training and expansion.
  • Provide on-site support during centre opening and initial operations to ensure smooth rollout.
  • Support the implementation and daily running of centre programmes. 
  • Conduct training and on-site guidance for franchisees and centre staff on programme delivery and operational procedures.
  • Carry out regular centre visits to check programme delivery, operational standards, and compliance requirements.
  • Support parent engagement, including programme explanation, enrolment support, and handling routine enquiries when needed.
  • Coordinate day-to-day matters between franchisees and HQ and submit basic visit or progress reports.
  • Perform other duties as assigned by management.

Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in a relevant field.
  • Experience in education, training, or centre operations is preferred.
  • Familiarity with tuition or enrichment centre operations is an advantage.
  • Conduct on-site operational support and training activities for franchisees and engaging with parents. Willing to perform field-based work, including centre visits and weekend support.


Tan Yen Zhen (Chen Yan Zhen) Reg No: R25138932

The SupremeHR Advisory Pte Ltd EA No: 14C7279
